series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports and supporting documentation that report stamped and unstamped cigaretees purchased from another Ohio licensed wholesaler.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Delete 3 years after he end of the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Paper: Destroy 3 years after he end of the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. If scanned, retain for 6 months., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
